title: Qualified wife who sits idle can be denied interim maintenance: Allahabad High Court
description: The Allahabad High Court recently dismissed a woman’s appeal challenging the denial of maintenance to her during the pendency of a divorce plea filed by her husband.The Court was dealing with a case involving a couple where the wife is a gynaecologist and her husband is a neurosurgeon. The wife alleged that she was removed from her job by a hospital after her husband filed a case and thus, was entitled to the support.However, the Division Bench of Justice Atul Sreedharan and Justice Vivek Saran
